name: TestimonialCardSixteen
description: Uniform grid testimonial cards with image, star rating overlay, and KPI stats section below.
details: Use for showcasing multiple testimonials with a stats/KPI summary. Layout: TextBox Header → Uniform Grid of Testimonial Cards → KPI Stats Bar. Each card displays a full-bleed image with a glassmorphic overlay containing star rating, name, role, and company. Fixed 'uniform-all-items-equal' grid layout. Below the grid, a responsive KPI section shows 3 stats with value and label, separated by dividers (horizontal on mobile, vertical on desktop). Best for client testimonials with credibility metrics.

description.example: Hear from those who've experienced our work

propsSchema.testimonials: Array<{ id: string, name: string, role: string, company: string, rating: number, imageSrc?: string, videoSrc?: string, imageAlt?: string, videoAriaLabel?: string }>
propsSchema.title: string (required)
propsSchema.titleSegments?: Array<{ type: 'text', content: string } | { type: 'image', src: string, alt?: string }> - For inline images in title
propsSchema.buttons?: Array<{text: string, onClick?: () => void, href?: string}>

usageExample: <TestimonialCardSixteen testimonials={[{ id: '1', name: 'Alisa Hester', role: 'PM', company: 'Web Design Agency', rating: 5, imageSrc: '/placeholder.jpg' }]} kpiItems={[{ value: '180+', label: 'Projects completed' }, { value: '96%', label: 'Client satisfaction' }, { value: '15+', label: 'Years experience' }]} animationType="slide-up" title="What Our Clients Say" description="Hear from those who've experienced our work" textboxLayout="default" useInvertedBackground={false} />
do: Use for testimonial sections with visual emphasis on people
Include exactly 3 KPI items for the bottom section
dont: Do not use without KPI items
Do not use without portrait images
